title: [T3.1] Build complete filesystem/process/signal parity matrix

gaps.divergence_risk: migration friction for tokio convenience wrappers

evidence_requirements: lab/runtime parity tests for deterministic fs behavior

gaps.divergence_risk: io_uring path semantics drift from blocking path
evidence_requirements: cross-path equivalence tests with io-uring on/off
platform matrix tests/docs for symlink_file/symlink_dir behavior

gaps.divergence_risk: blocking wait semantics vs async tokio behavior
evidence_requirements: async wait parity tests under load and cancellation

gaps.divergence_risk: missing PTY parity for interactive workloads
evidence_requirements: PTY capability matrix and e2e lifecycle tests
platform behavior table and CI evidence per supported OS

gaps.divergence_risk: zombie/leak or output truncation on cancellation
evidence_requirements: deterministic cancellation drills with kill_on_drop variants
windows-specific contract tests and behavior docs per signal class

gaps.divergence_risk: non-unix signal stream unsupported behavior ambiguity
evidence_requirements: deterministic fallback tests and migration guidance for non-unix builds
burst-signal e2e tests with monotonic counters and no-loss assertions
integration tests for controller plus os-signal race behavior

platform_semantics.known_divergence_risk: link semantics and permissions differ by os

platform_semantics.unix: io_uring feature path available on linux
platform_semantics.known_divergence_risk: fast-path behavior may drift from blocking-offload path
wait/kill/stdio edge behavior can differ by platform

platform_semantics.windows: api shape exposed with backend constraints
platform_semantics.known_divergence_risk: ctrl_c availability assumptions can fail off unix

signal_contracts.focus: unix signal stream creation and delivery semantics
pass_criteria: injected delivery is observed by recv() without silent drop
raw mapping includes SIGPIPE and SIGALRM
signal_contracts.failure_semantics: emit SG-G3 diagnostics with owner module and failing test identifier
signal_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync signal_recv_observes_delivery -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: non-unix behavior for signal() remains explicit via unsupported path
ctrl_c availability gate remains explicit and deterministic
signal_contracts.failure_semantics: emit SG-G1/SG-G2 diagnostics with owner module and unsupported-path mismatch
signal_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync ctrl_c_not_available -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: concurrent shutdown calls converge on a stable state
signal_contracts.failure_semantics: emit SG-G4 diagnostics with e2e test case id and owner module
signal_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test e2e_signal -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: SG-G1..SG-G4 remain synchronized between markdown and json artifacts
signal contract rows remain complete with owner modules, artifacts, and repro commands
drift diagnostics map each violation to owning bead/module
signal_contracts.failure_semantics: emit T3-DRIFT diagnostics with missing field/path and owning bead asupersync-2oh2u.3.5
signal_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix -- --nocapture

drift_detection_rules.rule: all ownership and evidence paths referenced by the matrix must exist in-repo
gap coverage must retain fs/process/signal families without silent row loss
platform semantics coverage must include unix/windows/wasm rows
each gap must preserve concrete downstream bead mapping
markdown and json artifacts must agree on bead id and declared gap ids
signal_contracts must include SGC-01..SGC-04 with pass criteria, owner modules, artifacts, and reproduction command
all signal contract owner/artifact paths must exist and each reproduction command must be rch-routed

ci_commands: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test e2e_signal -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync ctrl_c_not_available -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync signal_recv_observes_delivery -- --nocapture
